summary.goal: Rename project from llmgraph to memex throughout the codebase, and add --goal flag to node create for non-interactive (agent) use
decisions: Renamed binary, package, .llmgraph/ dir, XML context tags, temp file prefixes, and all user-facing strings from llmgraph to memex
Added --goal <text> flag to `memex node create` that skips the editor entirely — agents can now create nodes in one non-interactive command
Updated CLAUDE.md to document --goal and use it in the node creation step of the dev workflow
